title: Board Schedule v2
description: Delivery roadmap and milestone schedule for the Tungsten Supply Chain Compliance Platform, starting March 2026.

title: D3 Industry Default Values
description: Cross-validation default tolerance values for compliance lead review during Phase 1 pre-build.

title: D3 Tolerance Workshop Template
description: Workshop template for defining cross-validation tolerance thresholds during Phase 1 pre-build.

title: DFARS Compliance Feature Set
description: Complete feature specification for DFARS regulatory compliance capabilities within the Tungsten platform.

title: Tungsten Platform Spec v2.2 US Edition
description: Revised project specification (v2.2) for the Tungsten Supply Chain Compliance Platform, US Edition.

title: Tungsten Platform Spec v2.3 US Edition
description: Latest project specification (v2.3) covering architecture, compliance engine, and audit dossier requirements.

title: Tungsten Support Systems Register
description: Register of all support systems, integrations, and infrastructure components for the Tungsten platform.

title: Tungsten Documents & References Register
description: Master index of all project documents, references, and external standards referenced by the platform.

title: Architecture Diagram
description: High-level system architecture diagram showing platform components, data flow, and integration points.

title: DFARS Block Diagram
description: Block diagram illustrating the DFARS compliance verification workflow and decision logic.

title: Gantt Chart
description: Project timeline with phased delivery milestones, dependencies, and resource allocation.

title: Support Systems Diagram
description: Visual map of support systems, external service integrations, and their interconnections.
